narrative:
Ohio Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 424 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
